raw_text: If I could change the world in one way, I would ensure that every person, from birth, has access to clean water, nutritious food, and a safe place to sleep. Everything else—education, innovation, peace, art—requires a foundation of physical security. Without it, potential is wasted on survival.

message.content: If I could change the world in one way, I would ensure that every person, from birth, has access to clean water, nutritious food, and a safe place to sleep. Everything else—education, innovation, peace, art—requires a foundation of physical security. Without it, potential is wasted on survival.
